description_long: This coupe car features a classic, boxy design with a two-tone paint scheme, combining a dark upper body and a lighter lower section. The vehicle has a long hood, a short rear deck, and a pronounced notchback roofline, giving it a distinctly retro appearance. Chrome trim accents the windows, bumpers, and side mirrors, while the wheels are styled with simple, period-appropriate hubcaps. The car has two full-sized doors and a set of rectangular headlights and taillights, with a wide front grille and a flat rear fascia. The windows are large, providing good visibility, and the overall proportions suggest a mid-sized coupe from the late 1970s or early 1980s. The interior is likely composed of fabric and plastic, with metal reinforcements and glass windows.
description: A retro, two-tone coupe car with a boxy silhouette, chrome trim, and two full-sized doors. It features a notchback roofline, large windows, and classic hubcap wheels.
description_view_0: Side view showing the two-door configuration, chrome trim, and the distinct separation between the dark roof and lighter lower body.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the flat trunk, rectangular taillights, and wide rear bumper.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the two-door layout and chrome details, with clear visibility of the wheel design.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the wide grille, rectangular headlights, and the long, flat hood.
attribute_window_configuration: two-door coupe with two side windows
